title: Tom's + TFG Integration
description: Tom's Simple Storage integration mod for the TerraFirmaGreg modpack
body:
# TOMs + TFG Integration
[Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) integration mod for the [TerraFirmaGreg](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmagreg-modern) modpack

It just subtitutes the recipes for other ones that are more integrated in the TerraFirmaGreg modpack. Doesn't add any new features or changes to current mechanics.

# Distribution and modpacks
The distribution of this mod can only be done through Modrinth. You can only include the mod in a modpack if the launcher automatically downloads it through the Modrinth API. If you cannot do that then the user will have to download it manually.
